candidates.why: This D&A line appears below Gross margin alongside operating expense rows (External expenses, Staff costs) and above Total operating expenses, so it appears to be an operating overhead expense rather than a component of the selected COGS bucket 'Cost of sales'. Adding it to COGS would likely misclassify and double count outside the COGS bucket.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is only 'Cost of sales'. The visible D&A row is presented separately in operating expenses after gross margin, not as COGS/COR depreciation.

candidates.why: This D&A row is shown as a separate operating expense line at the same level as other overhead items and above Total operating expenses. The selected XSGA bucket consists of 'Selling, General & Admin', 'External expenses', and 'Staff costs', and the prior mapping notes explicitly excluded depreciation/amortisation. Therefore this row should be added separately to XSGA later.

variables.notes: Use the summary D&A row only. Do not also select the asset-type breakdown rows ('Lease Assets, External', 'Intangible assets', 'Property, plant and equipment') to avoid double counting.
